scripts.smoke: node --input-type=module -e "import { gameState } from './src/state.js'; import { createInitialMatchState, simulateMinute } from './src/matchSimulation.js'; const match = createInitialMatchState(gameState.team, gameState.opponent); for (let i = 0; i < 5; i += 1) simulateMinute(gameState.team, gameState.opponent, match); console.log(JSON.stringify({ minute: match.minute, score: [match.homeGoals, match.awayGoals] }));"
